prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约32252名→35714名→42008名→40816名→45633名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约13381名；2025年基准位次约45633名，较2024年大幅后移约4817名，显示竞争明显加剧；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划2021–2022年均为22人，2023–2025年缩减至20人；2026年计划仍为20人，与2025年持平，未出现扩招缓解竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第134名（2026年），近年排名在134–162之间波动，整体处于中后段211水平；2022年声誉中性/混合（投档线逐年下降趋势），2023年偏正面（食堂服务获好评）；抖音热度总排名第86位，评价为「一般」，综合热度较低；2022年曾出现投档线逐年下降的异常信号，但近年已趋稳，未见明显负面舆情冲击；第五轮学科评估中，畜牧学获评A、作物学获评A-，共2个A-及以上学科，与该校农林特色一致，对相关专业报考有一定支撑但吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业多属生化环材、机械等劝退/分化观望类方向，社会热度偏低；江苏省物理类考生数从2025年约26万大幅增至2026年约38万（增幅约46%），竞争压力显著上升；该校位于四川省成都市，在江苏省招生仅20人，占该校全国总招生比例极小（约0.4%），跨省地域偏好对报考热度影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、江苏省物理类考生数大幅增加约46%等关键因素，竞争加剧是主要驱动方向。在2025年基准45633名基础上，预计2026年最低位次进一步后移至约47633名，区间47133–48133名。

- 食品科学与工程（成都校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间47133–48133名内，建议以二档专业（财务管理、环境科学、风景园林）为主攻方向，一档专业（农业机械化及其自动化、食品科学与工程）作为冲刺，三档专业（生物工程、土木工程）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<47133）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>48133）应以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 32252 → 35714 → 42008 → 40816 → 45633, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 13381 positions in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 45633, a significant backward shift of about 4817 positions compared to 2024, indicating intensified competition; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu Province was 22 students in 2021–2022, reduced to 20 students in 2023–2025; the 2026 plan remains 20 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion to alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 134th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), with recent rankings fluctuating between 134 and 162, placing it in the mid-to-late tier of 211 universities; reputation was neutral/mixed in 2022 (with a declining trend in admission scores), slightly positive in 2023 (cafeteria services received praise); overall Douyin popularity ranked 86th, rated as 'average', with relatively low comprehensive popularity; in 2022, there was an abnormal signal of declining admission scores year by year, but it has stabilized in recent years with no significant negative public opinion impact; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Animal Science was rated A, Crop Science was rated A-, with a total of 2 A- or above disciplines, consistent with the university's agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing some support for related majors but with limited appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors are mostly in fields such as biology, chemistry, environment, materials, and mechanical engineering, which are often discouraged or viewed with caution, resulting in low social popularity; the number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu Province increased sharply from about 260,000 in 2025 to about 380,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 46%), significantly raising competitive pressure; the university is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, with only 20 students enrolled in Jiangsu Province, accounting for a very small proportion (about 0.4%) of its total national enrollment, so cross-provincial regional preferences have limited impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the significant increase of about 46% in the number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu Province, intensified competition is the main driving direction. Based on the 2025 baseline of 45633, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to further shift backward to about 47633, with a range of 47133–48133.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 47133–48133, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Financial Management, Environmental Science, Landscape Architecture) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Agricultural Mechanization and Automation, Food Science and Engineering) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Bioengineering, Civil Engineering) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<47133), you can prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>48133), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.
